parameters.query:
BEGIN TRANSACTION;

BEGIN TRY

  SELECT TOP 2 
    A.Id, A."Type", MediaSyncTime, Username,  MessageId, A.ChatId 
    INTO #TempSelectedRecords
  FROM XinhTelegramMedia A 
  JOIN TelegramGroupSource B ON A.ChatId = B.ChatId 
  WHERE 
    MediaLink IS NULL 
    AND MediaSyncTime < 3 
    AND A."Type" in ('FileType.PHOTO') 
    AND "Status" <> 'MEDIASYNC-FAIL'
  ORDER BY A.ChatId;
  
  UPDATE XinhTelegramMedia
  SET "Status" = 'MEDIASYNC-PROCESSING'
  WHERE Id IN (SELECT Id FROM #TempSelectedRecords);

  SELECT * FROM #TempSelectedRecords 
  CROSS JOIN
  (
    SELECT TOP 1 "Credentials" FROM CommunityAccount
    WHERE AccountType = 'LARK' 
    AND "Status" = 'ACTIVE'
  ) AS Account
   CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT TOP 1 Folder_token FROM CommunityStorageResource
    WHERE ResourceType = 'LARK'
    AND "Status" = 'ACTIVE'
  ) AS Storage;

  DROP TABLE #TempSelectedRecords;

COMMIT TRANSACTION;
END TRY
BEGIN CATCH
    ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
END CATCH;

nodes.name: Example of JSON to call UPLOAD

parameters.content: Consider to  add if node to check if already have app_access_token then no need to call to http request to get this
